title: Glass Mortar and Pestle Set, Guacamole Bowl with 2 Pcs Stainless Steel Powder Spoon, Mixer and Grinder for Herb Spice Science Lab, 2 oz
description:
About this item
The grinding bowl is made of transparent frosted glass, which somewhat increases the coefficient of friction and makes grinding easier and more efficient
The bottom of the mortar bowl is reinforced for extra stability when in use
Uniquely designed pouring port of guacamole bowl, for easy transfer of ground powder
In addition to the glass mortar and pestle, we also have 2 additional powder scoops to minimize unnecessary expenses
2 ounce capacity set for most use scenarios, great for grinding and mixing spices, garlic, herbs, pigments, and more
